message:
test(prune): add unit tests for argument parsing and format_size

Add 29 unit tests covering:
- Argument parsing for PruneArgs defaults, flags, and subcommands
- PruneCommand variants (List, Purge, Restore, Stats)
- PurgeArgs and RestoreArgs parsing
- Error cases for missing required arguments
- format_size function for bytes, KB, MB, and GB

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
